[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001001 2
1 0111001 4
2 0111010 4
3 0001111 4
4 0010010 2
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0101000 2

01 10 1111101 6
12 21 0101111 5
23 32 1110011 5
34 43 0110000 2
45 54 0000011 2
56 65 0110101 4
67 76 0011101 4
70 07 0111010 4 match 2

02 20 1010010 3
13 31 1011100 4
24 42 1000011 3
35 53 0110011 4
46 64 0110110 4
57 75 0101000 2 match 7
60 06 0100111 4
71 17 1000111 4

25 52 1000000 1

47 74 0101011 4
50 05 0010010 2 match 4
61 16 1011010 4
72 27 1101000 3

37 73 0011011 4
